name: telemetry-emitter
trigger: After significant decisions, tool denials, review actions, memory changes, and verification steps.
remediation: Emit a local JSON note or structured log using the relevant event contract.
limitations: Needs an adapter or manual artifact writing to be durable in practice.
The runner only emits advisory notes; it does not block missing telemetry events.
fallback_behavior: Record the event data in a local note or final report section.
